pattern: this code imports sensitive module OS and reads environment variables and performs network requests
description: The package likely reads API keys or AWS credentials and sends them to a remote server.

pattern: this code imports sensitive module SUBPROCESS and executes shell commands and performs network requests
description: The package executes arbitrary commands requested from a remote server.

pattern: this code accesses or modifies local file system and uses encoding to obfuscate data
description: The package is encrypting or deleting files on the local machine.

pattern: this code imports sensitive module REQUESTS and performs network requests to remote servers and runs in background
description: The package is part of a larger botnet infrastructure.

pattern: this code reads sensitive file paths or credentials and performs network requests
description: The package searches for user credentials in common file paths.
